positive: A vibrant, minimalist illustration of a celestial fox (kitsune) amongst swirling nebulae and geometric constellations. The fox should have an elegant, stylized silhouette, rendered in deep indigo and gold linework, contrasted against a gradient background of twilight purple and teal. Incorporate simple, abstract scientific elements like orbiting planetary rings and stylized constellations forming a mandala pattern. The composition must be central and impactful, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed line art, clean vector style, maximal negative space, mystical, sci-fi fantasy aesthetic. Studio quality print art, high contrast, centered composition, clean edges, flat lay style.
negative: blurry, grainy, low contrast, photorealistic, text, watermark, logo, signature, excessive detail, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, muted colors
